The stocks -- Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta Platforms and Tesla -- have stumbled in 2025, dragging down the benchmark indexes they had lifted to record peaks the prior two years.  The highly valued shares had swooned as investor fears spiked about the economic fallout from President Donald Trumps tariffs.
